Another wonderful
Visit to a European feeling night, we had lamb and duck and meatballs at the table. We sampled
Octopus and dolmas and wonderful
Watermelon salad w feta, roasted pine nut and basil. Delicious . Great service and delightful atmosphere . Always wonderful

Kokkari Estiatorio is a rather special one, a rare restaurant that manages to feel both animated and impeccably composed at the same time. We were looked after with particular charm by Miles, a waiter of enviable judgement, who guided us towards an excellent bottle of wine.

The starters arrive in the spirit of generosity and confidence: a selection of tapas-style dishes, each better than the last. One meatball in particular deserves mention, one that threatens to eclipse all reasonable expectations of what a meatball should be.

But the true moment of elevation comes with the salmon: crisped on the outside with a near architectural precision, yielding within to a soft, delicate richness, lifted by beautifully judged citrus notes. It is, quite simply, the finest piece of fish I have had the pleasure of encountering.

In short, Kokkari Estiatorio delivers a meal of genuine distinction, warm service, excellent wine, and cooking that lingers in the memory long after the table is cleared.
